about_me

Who I Am

I'm Nimir Zuher Mahmoud, a UI/UX designer specializing in dark futuristic mobile app interfaces. I believe great design isn't just seen — it's felt.

I build digital experiences that merge visual beauty with seamless usability, focusing on AI apps, fintech, fitness, e-learning, and food delivery.

I leverage cutting-edge AI tools like Google Stitch to deliver exceptional results at speed.
